targets.rawSql: SELECT service, dependency_status, round(avg(latency_ms), 2) AS avg_latency_ms, countIf(level = 'ERROR') AS errors, count() AS events FROM logs WHERE incident_mode = 'cascading_failure' GROUP BY service, dependency_status ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC
SELECT service, depends_on, dependency_count, dependency_status FROM logs WHERE incident_mode = 'cascading_failure' GROUP BY service, depends_on, dependency_count, dependency_status ORDER BY service

panels.title: Errors by Service and Dependency Status

targets.rawSql: SELECT service, dependency_status, countIf(level = 'ERROR') AS errors, count() AS total_events, round(countIf(level = 'ERROR') / count(), 3) AS error_rate FROM logs WHERE incident_mode = 'cascading_failure' GROUP BY service, dependency_status ORDER BY errors DESC

panels.title: Latency Rollup by Dependency Status (p95 / p99)

targets.rawSql: SELECT service, dependency_status, round(quantileMerge(0.95)(p95_latency_state), 2) AS p95_latency_ms, round(quantileMerge(0.99)(p99_latency_state), 2) AS p99_latency_ms FROM latency_rollup_1m WHERE incident_mode = 'cascading_failure' AND minute >= toStartOfMinute(now()) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE GROUP BY service, dependency_status ORDER BY p99_latency_ms DESC

SELECT minute, service, dependency_status, countMerge(event_count_state) AS events, countIfMerge(error_count_state) AS errors, round(avgMerge(avg_latency_state), 2) AS avg_latency_ms, round(quantileMerge(0.95)(p95_latency_state), 2) AS p95_latency_ms, round(quantileMerge(0.99)(p99_latency_state), 2) AS p99_latency_ms FROM latency_rollup_1m WHERE incident_mode = 'cascading_failure' AND minute >= toStartOfMinute(now()) - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE GROUP BY minute, service, dependency_status ORDER BY minute DESC, service
